item.title: TheCrowDBot - AI to transform hand drawn E-R diagrams into a draw.io compatible format
Nature as a Mentor: Shinrin-yoku in Youth Work Practices
item.description:
Training Course (TC)
  Dobczyce, Poland
 12 July 2026 - 19 July 2026
 Organized by Fundacja Innowacyjnej Edukacji

  About

Nature as a Mentor: Shinrin-yoku in Youth Work Practices was an Erasmus+ Training Course designed for youth workers and educators interested in integrating nature-based methods into their work with young people.

The project focused on Shinrin-yoku (Forest Bathing) and other holistic outdoor approaches that promote well-being, resilience, inclusion, and self-awareness. Through non-formal education, participants explored how nature can become a practical educational tool to support young people in dealing with stress, uncertainty, and the increasing pace of modern life.

item.title: Youth Accreditation Mobility
item.description:
Youth Exchange (YE)
  Sakarya, Türkiye
 28 March 2026 - 5 April 2026
 Organized by International consortium of Erasmus+ accredited organizations

About

This Erasmus+ youth mobility brought together participants from seven European countries to foster active citizenship, leadership, and intercultural understanding through non-formal education and collaborative learning.

The project provided an opportunity to exchange perspectives with young people from different backgrounds while exploring topics such as digital competences, entrepreneurship, sustainability, and European values.

item.title: Green Horizons: Youth for Sustainable Communities
item.description:
Youth Exchange (YE)
  La Zarza de Pumareda, Salamanca, Spain
 13 July 2025 - 19 July 2025
 Organized by Fundación Plan B Educación Social

About

Green Horizons: Youth for Sustainable Communities was an Erasmus+ Youth Exchange that brought together young people from different European countries to explore sustainability, climate action, and active participation through non-formal education and intercultural learning.

Set in rural Spain, the project provided an opportunity to exchange ideas, collaborate with participants from diverse backgrounds, and reflect on the role young people can play in creating more sustainable communities.

item.title: Youth Participa(c)tion
item.description:
Training Course (TC)
  Breaza, Romania
 1 July 2026 - 8 July 2026
 Organized by A.C.T.O.R. – Asociatia Culturala pentru Teatru si Origami din Romania

About

Youth Participa(c)tion was an Erasmus+ Training Course that brought together youth workers and active young people from different countries to explore ways of strengthening youth participation in democratic life and society.

Through non-formal education methods, group activities, and intercultural exchange, participants shared experiences and developed tools to encourage active citizenship and meaningful participation among young people.
